◎简　　介  

　　“The Silence before Bach” is an approach to music and the trades and subjects that surround it through Bach’s works.A look at the profound dramaturgic relationship between image and music where the latter is not merely conceived as subsidiary to the image but as a subject of the narration in its own right.The film springs from a previously defined musical structure.
